steps.title: Use the lack of evidence
steps.content: The text lists several competing origin claims for red velvet cake, then says no clear evidence favors one claim over the others. The conclusion should reflect uncertainty, not choose a winner.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: A adds an origin before the 1860s, but the text gives no evidence for that. C says none of the claimants likely invented the cake, which is stronger than the evidence allows. D favors the Austin bakery even though the text says no claim is favored. The answer is B.
